data.title: China’s tech firms aggressively push for a yuan-pegged stablecoin abroad
data.description:
JD. com and Ant want to establish stablecoins in Hong Kong that are pegged to China’s offshore yuan.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/chinas-tech-firms-offshore-yuan/

data.title: Bank of England Governor warns: Stablecoins threaten public trust in money
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey warned that the rise of stablecoins could undermine public trust in currency as experts warned of the threat posed by the large-scale application of cryptocurrencies backed by the US dollar. In a speech released on Thursday, Bailey said that central banks need to "pay close attention" to innovations in the payment field to prevent them from introducing new vulnerabilities to the monetary system. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Sentora: 99% of BTC holders are currently profitable
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Sentora published an article stating that as the price of Bitcoin gradually approaches its historical high, 99% of the current holders are in a profitable state.

data.title: Bitcoin Holders See Profits as Prices Near All-Time Highs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Sentora, formerly known as IntoTheBlock, reported that as Bitcoin's price approaches its historical peak, 99% of Bitcoin holders are currently in a profitable position.

data.title: DWF Partner: Bitcoin and crypto-related stocks may hit new highs, and some altcoins will follow suit
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Andrei Grachev, managing partner of DWF Labs, wrote that the approval of the "Big and Beautiful Act", seasonal market activity in the fourth quarter, and potential interest rate cuts will push Bitcoin and crypto-related stocks to new highs. The altcoin market may partially follow the rise, but most medium-sized currencies are expected to underperform Bitcoin, and the opportunity has come again.

data.title: The Open Platform Secures $28.5 Million in Series A Funding, Valuation Reaches $1 Billion
data.description:
According to PANews, The Open Platform, a development platform within the Telegram ecosystem, has successfully raised $28.5 million in a Series A funding round, bringing its post-investment valuation to $1 billion. The round was led by fintech investment firm Ribbit Capital, with participation from crypto venture capital firm Pantera Capital. Approximately 5% of equity was sold in this round, excluding any cryptocurrency shares. The Open Platform has now raised over $70 million in total.

TOP serves as the core developer for Telegram's official blockchain, The Open Network (TON), and has launched the 'Telegram Wallet' for users in regions such as Russia and Asia. The company's CEO stated that the new funds will be utilized to expand into compliant markets in Europe and the United States, as well as to incubate blockchain games and AI applications based on TON.

data.title: DeFi Development Corp Increases SOL Holdings Significantly
data.description: According to Odaily, DeFi Development Corp, a publicly traded company in the U.S., has announced an additional acquisition of 17,760 SOL tokens. As of July 3, 2025, the company holds a total of 640,585 SOL tokens and equivalent assets, valued at $98.1 million.

data.title: Riot Platforms Reports Decline in Bitcoin Mining Output for June 2025
data.description: According to Odaily, Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Riot Platforms has released its unaudited production and operations update for June 2025. The report reveals a decrease in mining output, with 450 BTC mined in June compared to 514 BTC in May, marking a 12% month-over-month decline. Additionally, the company sold 397 BTC last month, increasing its total Bitcoin holdings to 19,273 BTC.

data.description:

data.title: Abraxas Capital Withdraws $126 Million Worth of ETH from CEX in the Last 24 Hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, Abraxas Capital withdrew 48,823 ETH (worth $126 million) from Binance and Kraken in the past 24 hours. Wallets suspected to be associated with Matrixport withdrew 40,734 ETH (worth $104 million) from Binance and OKX in the past 24 hours.

data.title: Bank of England Governor Warns of Stablecoin Impact on Currency Trust
data.description:
According to PANews, Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey has issued a warning regarding the potential threat posed by stablecoins backed by the U.S. dollar. Bailey highlighted concerns that the widespread adoption of these cryptocurrencies could undermine public trust in traditional currencies.

In a speech released on Thursday, Bailey emphasized the need for central banks to "closely monitor" innovations in the payment sector to prevent new vulnerabilities in the monetary system. His remarks come amid growing expert warnings about the implications of stablecoins on financial stability.

data.title: Nano Labs increases its holdings of BNB by 74,315, expanding its digital asset reserves to approximately $160 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nasdaq-listed Web 3.0 infrastructure and product solution provider Nano Labs Ltd announced today that it has purchased 74,315 BNBs through over-the-counter (OTC) transactions, with an average purchase price of approximately $672.45 and a total transaction volume of approximately $50 million. After the completion of this transaction, the company's cumulative reserves of mainstream digital currencies including Bitcoin and BNB have reached approximately $160 million.

data.title: Gate Alpha's top 4 gainers today: Sendit, CrazyFrog, RIZZ and MANYU
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the top 4 currencies ranked by Gate Alpha today are: Sendit (915.32%), CrazyFrog (215.23%), RIZZ (206.65%), MANYU (155.77%).
Alpha has listed 10 on-chain tokens including Impossible cloud network (ICNT) today, and you can trade them by entering the APP. The third Gate Alpha Points Festival has been opened. Participants in the transaction can share a million-dollar prize pool, and everyone can receive a $100 reward.
Gate Alpha now supports popular public chains such as SOL, ETH, BNB Chain and Base. Users can use USDT in the spot account to directly purchase popular assets on the chain without manually changing chains, recharging or authorizing.

data.title: The Open Platform Completes $28.5 Million Series A Funding, Led by Ribbit Capital
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Telegram ecosystem development platform The Open Platform announced the completion of a $28.5 million Series A financing, with a post-investment valuation of $1 billion. This round was led by financial technology investment institution Ribbit Capital, and crypto venture capital Pantera Capital participated. This financing transferred about 5% of the equity, and did not include cryptocurrency shares. The Open Platform has raised more than $70 million in total.
TOP is the core developer of Telegram's official blockchain The Open Network (TON), and its "Telegram Wallet" has been opened to users in Russia, Asia and other regions. The company's CEO said that the new funds will be used to expand the European and American compliance markets and incubate blockchain games and AI applications based on TON. (Fortune)

data.title: Non-farm data exceeded expectations, and the three major U.S. stock indexes opened slightly higher
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. stocks opened, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.19%, the S&P 500 rose 0.36%, and the Nasdaq rose 0.56%. Xpeng Motors (XPEV.N) opened up 3.48%, and the company's world's first L3-level computing power AI car, Xpeng G7, was launched. Robinhood (HOOD.O) opened down 2.7%, after OpenAI denied any connection with the Robinhood token.
